text: Standing alone in these shadowy, silent spaces fills me with curiosity but also a sense of unease. The sterile, modern environment feels almost otherworldly when not bustling with people. Shadows mingle with the faint electric glow, and every reflection and echo provokes contemplation about solitude, security, and the nature of work in such impersonal places. I feel like an observer on the boundary between purposeful human activity and the stillness that follows its absence.
